plugins.name: sdlc-skill-chain
plugins.description: SDLC Skill Chain v1.1: 7 core skills (requirement-analysis, architecture-design, architecture-validation, design-review, project-scaffolding, module-design, iteration-planning) + context-compression utility + 3 domain extensions (ai-agent, data-pipeline, mobile-app). Built on VCMF framework with DIVE cycle.
